evals.expected_output: Cloze CSV with cards about pancreatic necrosis (lack of enhancement), peripancreatic fluid collections, and CT imaging features. Each card under 40 words, 1-2 cloze deletions, standalone sentences.
Both cloze and basic CSVs with cards differentiating hemangioma from metastasis on MRI (T2 signal, enhancement patterns, diffusion restriction). Prioritizes differentiating features.
